economic_notes: First Nation owns 51% of Hollow Water-WERI Construction Ltd. (proportionate consolidation). First Nation holds one-seventh ownership in South Beach Casino Limited Partnership (modified equity method). COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with unknown financial impact.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 statements were signed by auditors on May 12, 2022 — a significant delay of over two years. Consolidated entity includes Hollow Water First Nation Housing Authority, Gaming Centre, Wanipigaa-Sibi Development Corporation (fully consolidated), and 51% of Hollow Water-WERI Construction Ltd. (proportionate consolidation). South Beach Casino Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method (1/7 ownership). Budget information was not provided and is a noted departure from PSA standards. Construction in progress of $9,870,538 (water treatment plant/lagoon expansion and 4-unit housing) not included in TCA net book value. Demand loan of $1,103,986 related to legal claim against Government of Canada. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($10,280,900) + Health Canada ($2,816,769) + CMHC ($398,293) net of deferred adjustments applied to revenue subtotal of $12,521,246; OSR calculated as total revenue minus government transfer subtotal.
